name: Sarpagandha
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Vata and Kapha.
mainMedicinalUses: World-famous for reducing high blood pressure.
Used for anxiety, insomnia, and psychiatric disorders.
plantProfile: Source of Reserpine, used globally for hypertension.
preparationMethods: Fine root powder often given with milk at night.
safetyProfile: Avoid in depression and cardiac weakness.
